feat: multi-provider AI with configurable model chains and fallback

Replaces all hardcoded model constants with a configurable, provider-agnostic
routing layer. Users can register Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini API keys,
select which models to enable, and define per-feature model chains with
automatic fallback.

- New DB tables: ai_providers, ai_models, ai_feature_models (migration 0007)
  seeds from existing anthropic_api_key/openai_api_key settings
- Provider adapters (src/main/ai/providers/): Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini
  each implement fetchModels, chat, and optional embed; live model list
  from provider APIs with capability detection (chat/embedding/image)
- Model router (src/main/ai/modelRouter.ts): resolveChain + callWithFallback
  with AggregateError and fallback warning propagation
- All embedding files refactored to callWithFallback (11 feature slots)
- Settings: LLM Providers sub-tab (AIProviderCard, live fetch, grouped model
  list with custom checkboxes) + AI Features sub-tab (FeatureChainEditor,
  per-slot chain builder); single Save button via defineExpose/getData()
- Chat sidebar: Default option (uses configured chain) + per-model override;
  no auto-selection on mount; fallback warning shown in assistant messages
- Inline AI modal: same dynamic model list as chat sidebar (Default + enabled
  chat models); overrideModelId wired through IPC to generateInlineContent
- Removed constants/models.ts (replaced by dynamic provider list)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix album art background opacity — was mathematically invisible

opacity: 0.18 + bg-void/85 scrim compounded to ~RGB(16,14,13),

to 0.45 and lightened scrim to bg-void/70 so the album art reads
as atmospheric color without compromising text legibility.

commit.message:
Simplify FailSource: fix auth architecture, remove dead code, DRY up storage

- Split single router into service_router (Bearer auth, no Basic Auth) and
  admin_router (Basic Auth) — removes leaky path-prefix bypass from global
  verify_credentials
- Extract _apply_update helper and _READ_ONLY_FIELDS constant to eliminate
  duplicated update logic in update_user/update_permission_set
- Use get_assignments_for_user/get_assignments_for_permission_set in delete
  methods instead of duplicating the assignment scan
- Extract FS_API_VERSION constant replacing 25+ hardcoded "v62.0" strings
- Clear tokens on /admin/failsource/clear (previously leaked unbounded)
- Remove dead code: unused HTTPBasic instance, unused find_users/find_permission_sets
- Fix wrong ENTITY_IS_DELETED error code to NOT_FOUND on PATCH/DELETE endpoints
- Use _new_id() for token generation instead of inline uuid call

commit.message:
fix: env isolation, CLI path, default mode, test isolation, docs

1. [High] Env isolation: whitelist-based subprocess env in strict mode
   (CTI_ENV_ISOLATION=strict|inherit), strips CLAUDECODE + ANTHROPIC_*
   by default. Shell layer (daemon.sh) and JS layer (llm-provider.ts)
   both enforce isolation.

2. [High] Build freshness: daemon.sh rebuilds dist if src is newer.

3. [High] SDK CLI health check in doctor.sh: verifies cli.js exists
   and dist/daemon.mjs is fresh.

4. [Medium] CLI path resolution: added `command -v claude` fallback
   and X_OK permission check instead of existsSync.

5. [Medium] CTI_DEFAULT_MODE now works: new bindings read default mode
   from settings instead of hardcoding 'code'. Added bridge_default_mode
   to configToSettings.

6. [Low] Fixed daemon.pid → bridge.pid in usage.md and troubleshooting.md.

7. [Medium] Test isolation: CTI_HOME is now injectable via env var.
   Tests auto-create a temp dir, never touch ~/.claude-to-im.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 3/5/6 完整实现：预选池 + 盘中实时预警 + 盘后回测扫描

## Phase 3: 预选池生成 (T-1)
- conditions.py: 17个条件纯函数（A类历史/B类指标/C类实时），全向量化
- pre_screener.py: T-1预选引擎，全市场→A类过滤→B类预筛→写入池
- pool_repository.py: 预选池DuckDB存储（pre_screen.duckdb，pool+kline两张表）
- scripts/daily_pre_screen.py: 预选入口脚本

## Phase 5: 盘中实时预警（含爬虫条件）
- intraday_monitor.py: 盘中监控核心（~750行），两阶段架构
  - 掘金条件（向量化）: B1/B2/B6/B13/C3/C4/C5/C7/C10/C11/C12
  - 爬虫阶段1: 东财日K线→筹码分布→C8(获利>78%)+C18(集中度>昨日)
  - 爬虫阶段2: 主力资金C19 + 5分钟K线C20(14:30后)
- juejin_client.py: 新增 get_current_quotes() 实时行情接口
- eastmoney_kline.py: 新增 get_money_flow() 主力资金 + 修复end参数
- conditions.py: 新增C8/C18/C20三个爬虫条件函数
- indicators.py: 新增 calc_chip_distribution() 筹码分布算法
- scripts/intraday_alert.py: 盘中预警入口

## Phase 6: 盘后回测扫描
- post_market_scanner.py: 19条件历史回测（跳过C20），两层评估
  - Tier1: 向量化快速条件（~5000→~10只）
  - Tier2: 逐只筹码C8+C18计算
  - 批量加载策略：一次性加载全范围数据，逐日切片
- backtest_repository.py: 回测结果DuckDB存储
- scripts/scan_alert.py: 回测入口 main(start, end, save, debug)
- scripts/read_backtest.py: 结果查询 + 绩效分析（胜率/盈亏比/夏普/净值曲线）

## 回测绩效 (2025.1-2026.2, 131条预警, 88交易日)
- T+1开: 胜率35.9%, 夏普-2.35
- T+1收: 胜率36.6%, 夏普-0.13
- T+2收: 胜率42.7%, 夏普0.33 (最佳持仓期)
- T+3收: 胜率40.0%, 夏普0.18

## 文档更新
- tasks/todo.md, lessons.md, phase3/5/6_plan.md
- 文档/dev_progress.md, phase3_review.md, 初始文档.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix broken #literal-quasi-embedded includes in TextMate grammar (#706)

## Summary
- Replace 21 broken `#literal-quasi-embedded` references with
`#native-interpolation` (already defined, handles `${...}` template
substitutions)
- Remove 2 broken `#graphql-object-type` references in the enum pattern
- Remove unused `graphql-union-mark` pattern (dead code)
- Add structural validation test that catches broken `#include`
references across all grammar files
- Recommend `redcmd.tmlanguage-syntax-highlighter` VS Code extension for
grammar editing

## Context

The `#literal-quasi-embedded` pattern was inherited from an upstream
grammar (`vscode-graphql-syntax`) but was never defined in the
repository. The `#native-interpolation` pattern already exists and
serves the same purpose — handling `${...}` interpolation at every
nesting level when the grammar is used inside JS/TS template literals
via the injection grammar.

A thorough review of the grammar uncovered additional issues tracked in
#707.

Fixes #651

## Test plan
- [x] New structural validation test fails before fix, passes after
- [x] All 16 grammar tests pass
- [x] Verify syntax highlighting still works in VS Code for `.graphql`
files
- [x] Verify syntax highlighting works in JS/TS template literals
(`gql\`...\``)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
hotfix: fix route ID lookup in routes_to_delete using awk (ENC-TSK-796) (#111)

JMESPath filter expressions silently fail when the filter string contains
curly braces (e.g. {fileName}).  The result is the literal string "None"
instead of the actual RouteId, causing delete-route to throw
NotFoundException.

Fix: fetch all routes as tab-separated RouteKey<TAB>RouteId pairs
(--output text --query 'Items[].[RouteKey,RouteId]') and use awk -F'\t'
to extract the RouteId by exact key match.  awk handles curly braces in
field values without issue.

CAI-e89a1f3a8862415fba4e2566d2901cc0

ENC-TSK-796 | ENC-TSK-795 | ENC-TSK-794 | ENC-FTR-040

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace httputil.ReverseProxy with buffer-and-forward handler

httputil.ReverseProxy streams response bodies via io.Copy, which
deadlocks when used with gvisor's userspace TCP (from tsnet.Dial):
if the downstream write blocks, gvisor can't process upstream ACKs
in the same goroutine, so both sides stall. This caused the 35KB
system.settings init query to hang indefinitely while small responses
completed instantly.

Buffer both request and response bodies fully before forwarding,
decoupling the tsnet read from the downstream write. Also replaces
chunked Transfer-Encoding with explicit Content-Length.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- --js-flags=--max-old-space-size=128 (cap V8 heap)
- --renderer-process-limit=1
- --disable-extensions, --disable-background-networking

v7 diagnostic adds memory tracking (RSS) at each step.

commit.message:
chore: 将 CLAUDE.md 加入 .gitignore，不再同步到 GitHub

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix syntax_check for classes: use ADT activation instead of checkruns

Root cause: The ADT /sap/bc/adt/checkruns endpoint does not support
ABAP OO class URIs (/oo/classes/). It returns HTTP 400 with namespace
error "System expected {checkrun}checkObjectList". This caused the
agent to loop on the error and eventually timeout.

Fix: Split syntax_check into two code paths:
- Programs/includes: Keep using /sap/bc/adt/checkruns (works fine)
- Classes/interfaces: Use /sap/bc/adt/activation endpoint instead,
  which performs syntax check AND activation in one call. If there
  are syntax errors, activation fails and returns them. If clean,
  the class is both checked and activated.

Also: When checkruns returns HTTP error for programs, return a clear
actionSummary telling the agent "Do NOT retry — report to user" to
prevent infinite retry loops on technical errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(state-maps): add state-wise GSDP indicators from RBI Handbook

Adds three new choropleth indicators sourced from the RBI Handbook of
Statistics on Indian States (Tables 21 & 22):

- GSDP Growth Rate: real YoY % at constant 2011-12 prices (RdBu colormap)
- GSDP (Real): ₹ Crore at constant 2011-12 prices (Blues colormap)
- GSDP (Nominal): ₹ Crore at current prices (Oranges colormap)

Data covers 33 states/UTs across 14 fiscal years (2011-12 to 2024-25),
converted from ₹ Lakh to ₹ Crore. Three UTs with no separate RBI figures
(Ladakh, Lakshadweep, Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu) are stored
as null values and shown as no-data on the map.

Changes:
- types.ts: GSDPStateSeries + GSDPStateData interfaces
- useMospiState.ts: useGSDPStateData() hook + gsdpStateSlice() helper
- state-maps.tsx: GSDP hook, loading/error handling, period/data
  resolution branch, dynamic unit prop, updated description/sources
- public/data/mospi/gsdp-state.json: 36-state × 14-year dataset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
